Worldwide Box Office $92,670,237
Domestic Physical Disc Sales

Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $356,147
Total $11,309,266

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$40,570,365 (62.4% of total gross)
Legs:1.60 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:70.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$17,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,105 opening theaters/3,105 max. theaters, 3.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $103,656,555

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 13th, 2009 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: March 13th, 2009 (Wide), released as Friday The 13th (Australia)
Video Release: June 16th, 2009 by Warner Home Video, released as Friday the 13th (2009)
MPA Rating: R for strong bloody violence, some graphic sexual content, nudity, language and drug material.
Running Time: 97 minutes
Franchise: Friday the 13th
Cast, crew, or production detail: Reboot
Subgenre: Slasher Horror

Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production/Financing Companies: New Line Cinema, Paramount Pictures, Michael Bay, Platinum Dunes
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
